**What does this PR do?**

**Related issues**
Fixes # (issue number)

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Backend starts without errors (`python main.py`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`npm run tauri dev` or `npm run build`)
- [ ] Hotkey (`Ctrl+Shift+.`) triggers dictation
- [ ] Pill overlay appears and reflects recording state
- [ ] AI Polish toggle works (both on/off)
- [ ] No new lint warnings
- [ ] No keystroke logging or clipboard leaks
